expectedAnswers: Thanks! I'm so happy you came!
Hey, thanks! You made my day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合口语习惯，语气友好
关键词覆盖：使用了 thanks / happy / came 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Happy birthday! Hope you have a fantastic day!
content.speakerTextCn: 生日快乐！希望你今天过得精彩！
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! That's so kind of you.
I really appreciate it! I'm going to enjoy every moment.
Wow, thank you! You're the best!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了祝福并表达了感激
语言准确性：使用了正确的时态和搭配
表达自然度：语气热情、符合日常对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 thanks / appreciate / fantastic / kind 等关键词

content.speakerText: Happy birthday! Did you get any cool gifts?
content.speakerTextCn: 生日快乐！收到什么酷礼物了吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I got a book I’ve been wanting and a cake from my mom.
I’m so grateful! My friends threw me a little surprise party.
Yeah, thanks! Nothing huge, but it’s the thought that counts.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：先感谢祝福，再回应问题
语言准确性：语法正确，表达连贯
表达自然度：语气真实，符合朋友间闲聊风格
关键词覆盖：使用了 thanks / grateful / gifts / party / thought 等关键词
